_wiring: VAL is wired to the same OpenAI-compatible RMIT NPE gateway used by h5p Creator: POST https://val-npe.rmit.edu.au/api/chat/completions. Default model is gpt-5.6-sol and can be overridden with VAL_MODEL in .env. To run it, set VAL_API_KEY on the SAGE server (never in this file, never from users), then confirm via GET /api/admin/status in an admin deployment. Adjust auth_header/auth_scheme only if the gateway changes to a non-standard header.
